notes: Conceptual technical-roadmap schematic created under author supervision. Script exports A4 landscape PNG/PDF to `plots/publication/` and writes frozen copies under `plots/publication/frozen/` to prevent accidental overwrite during rebuilds.
Exports F2 PDF/PNG from the reproducibility audit table (run_id/env_hash/seed/hash comparisons) as an environmental-fidelity view.

Exports F3 PDF/PNG from the scRNA benchmark table (baseline vs Harmony vs scVI rows) and a Visium interoperability panel with cross-method concordance (derived from weight tables; optionally reads `biological_output_concordance.tsv` when present).

Exports publication-grade F4 when deconvolution anchors exist (spot-level weight maps + uncertainty + cross-method concordance); otherwise falls back to a minimal diagnostic figure with a missing-inputs checklist. Refreshed 2026-02-08 using cell2location GPU medium run_id=20260208T061354Z-visium_deconvolution-dcb151388b.

Exports F5 PDF/PNG from the runtime/failure evidence table (wall time + failure types), computing reliability over terminal runs {ok, fail}. Resource/cost columns are reserved and may be empty depending on the runner.
Exports F6 PDF/PNG from robustness matrix (perturbation × method × dataset → delta metrics + threshold outcome).
